metadata.description: Location for all resources.
Name for your AI Services resource.
The name of the model you want to deploy
The provider of your model
The version of your model
The sku of your model deployment
The tokens per minute (TPM) of your model deployment
Optional. List of model deployments to create. If provided and non-empty, it takes precedence over the single-model parameters.
Name for your project resource.

projectDescription.defaultValue: A project for the AI Foundry account with network secured deployed Agent

metadata.description: This project will be a sub-resource of your account
The display name of the project
Virtual Network name for the Agent to create new or existing virtual network
The name of Agents Subnet to create new or existing subnet for agents
The name of Private Endpoint subnet to create new or existing subnet for private endpoints
Existing Virtual Network name Resource ID
Address space for the VNet (only used for new VNet)
Address prefix for the agent subnet. The default value is 192.168.0.0/24 but you can choose any size /26 or any class like 10.0.0.0 or 172.168.0.0
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet
The AI Search Service full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.
The AI Storage Account full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.
The Cosmos DB Account full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.
The Key Vault full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created (when includeAssociatedResources=true).
Optional. When false, the module will not deploy or update the VNet/subnets. Use this when the VNet/subnets are managed by a landing zone template.
Object mapping DNS zone names to their resource group, or empty string to indicate creation
Zone Names for Validation of existing Private Dns Zones
The name of the project capability host to be created
Optional. Account capability host name to create (standard/public mode). When empty, the module assumes the service auto-created accountName@aml_aiagentservice.
If false, skips creation of private endpoints and private DNS configuration (useful for Platform Landing Zone scenarios).

When false, the component will still create Private Endpoints but will skip Private DNS Zones, DNS VNet links, and Private DNS Zone Groups. Use this for Platform Landing Zone (Model B) scenarios where the workload deployer has no permissions on platform-owned DNS resources.
Optional. When false, the module will NOT deploy associated resources (AI Search, Storage, Cosmos) or their private endpoints/DNS.
Optional. AI Search public network access. Default: Disabled.
Optional. AI Search network rules (used when aiSearchPublicNetworkAccess=Enabled). Example: { bypass: "None", ipRules: [ { value: "1.2.3.4" } ] }.
Optional. Cosmos DB public network access. Default: Disabled.

Optional. Cosmos DB IP allowlist (used when cosmosDbPublicNetworkAccess=Enabled). Example: ["1.2.3.4","5.6.7.0/24"]. Note: RFC1918 ranges (10/8, 172.16/12, 192.168/16, 100.64/10) are not enforceable by Cosmos IP firewall rules; use Private Endpoints and/or VNet rules instead.
Optional. Storage Account public network access. Default: Disabled.
Optional. Storage Account network ACLs (used when storageAccountPublicNetworkAccess=Enabled). Example: { bypass: "AzureServices", defaultAction: "Deny", ipRules: [ { value: "1.2.3.4" } ] }.
Optional. Key Vault public network access. Default: Disabled.
Optional. Key Vault network ACLs (used when keyVaultPublicNetworkAccess=Enabled). Example: { bypass: "AzureServices", defaultAction: "Deny", ipRules: [ { value: "1.2.3.4" } ] }.
Optional. When false, the module will NOT create Capability Hosts (Foundry Agent Service) or perform its dependent role assignments.
Optional. When false, skips the best-effort deployment script delay used before creating the project capability host (useful when deploymentScripts are blocked by policy).
Optional. How long to wait (in seconds) before creating the project capability host, to give the service time to finish provisioning the account-level capability host. Default: 600 (10 minutes).
Azure region for the deployment
The name of the virtual network
Indicates if an existing VNet should be used
Subscription ID of the existing VNet (if different from current subscription)
Resource Group name of the existing VNet (if different from current resource group)
The name of Agents Subnet
The name of Private Endpoint subnet

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 0)), createObject('value', parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')))]

metadata.description: Name of the virtual network
Name of the subnet
Address prefix for the subnet
Array of subnet delegations

subnetId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1])]

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('peSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 1)), createObject('value', parameters('peSubnetPrefix')))]

Name of the subnet

Array of subnet delegations

subnetId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1])]

parameters.agentSubnetId: [if(variables('varHasVnet'), createObject('value', coalesce(if(parameters('deployVnetAndSubnets'), tryGet(if(parameters('deployVnetAndSubnets'), reference('vnet'), null()), 'outputs', 'agentSubnetId', 'value'), null()), if(not(empty(parameters('existingVnetResourceId'))), format('{0}/subnets/{1}', parameters('existingVnetResourceId'), parameters('agentSubnetName')), ''))), createObject('value', ''))]

metadata.description: Optional. List of model deployments to create. If provided and non-empty, it takes precedence over the single-model parameters.

variables.effectiveModelDeployments: [if(not(empty(parameters('modelDeployments'))), parameters('modelDeployments'), createArray(createObject('name', parameters('modelName'), 'modelName', parameters('modelName'), 'modelFormat', parameters('modelFormat'), 'modelVersion', parameters('modelVersion'), 'modelSkuName', parameters('modelSkuName'), 'modelCapacity', parameters('modelCapacity'))))]

properties.networkAcls: [if(variables('varIsNetworkInjected'), createObject('defaultAction', 'Deny', 'virtualNetworkRules', createArray(), 'ipRules', createArray(), 'bypass', 'AzureServices'), createObject('defaultAction', 'Allow', 'virtualNetworkRules', createArray(), 'ipRules', createArray(), 'bypass', 'AzureServices'))]

metadata.description: Map of model deployment name to deployment resource ID.

modelDeploymentResourceIdsByName.value: [reduce(variables('modelDeploymentPairs'), createObject(), lambda('acc', 'p', union(lambdaVariables('acc'), createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('p').name), lambdaVariables('p').id))))]

Optional. The name of the diagnostic setting.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set the specific logs to collect here.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category group for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `allLogs` to collect all logs.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of logs that will be streamed. "allLogs" includes all possible logs for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable log collection.
Required. Name of a Diagnostic Metric category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `AllMetrics` to collect all metrics.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of metrics that will be streamed. "allMetrics" includes all possible metrics for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable metric collection.
Optional. A string indicating whether the export to Log Analytics should use the default destination type, i.e. AzureDiagnostics, or use a destination type.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic log analytics workspace. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic storage account. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic event hub authorization rule for the Event Hubs namespace in which the event hub should be created or streamed to.

Optional. Name of the diagnostic event hub within the namespace to which logs are streamed. Without this, an event hub is created for each log category. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. The full ARM resource ID of the Marketplace resource to which you would like to send Diagnostic Logs.
An AVM-aligned type for a diagnostic setting. To be used if both logs & metrics are supported by the resource provider.

Optional. Specify the type of lock.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create.
Optional. Tags to be applied on all resources/Resource Groups in this deployment.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.

An AVM-aligned type for a private endpoint. To be used if the private endpoint's default service / groupId can be assumed (i.e., for services that only have one Private Endpoint type like 'vault' for key vault).
Optional. The name (as GUID) of the role assignment. If not provided, a GUID will be generated.

Required. The role to assign. You can provide either the display name of the role definition, the role definition GUID, or its fully qualified ID in the following format: '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c2f4ef07-c644-48eb-af81-4b1b4947fb11'.
Required. The principal ID of the principal (user/group/identity) to assign the role to.
Optional. The principal type of the assigned principal ID.
Optional. The description of the role assignment.

Optional. The conditions on the role assignment. This limits the resources it can be assigned to. e.g.: @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:ContainerName] StringEqualsIgnoreCase "foo_storage_container".
Optional. Version of the condition.
Optional. The Resource Id of the delegated managed identity resource.
An AVM-aligned type for a role assignment.
Optional. The expiration time for the new key version. It should be in ISO8601 format. Eg: "P90D", "P1Y".
Optional. The attributes of key rotation policy.
Optional. The type of the action.
Optional. The type of the action.
Optional. The time duration after key creation to rotate the key. It only applies to rotate. It will be in ISO 8601 duration format. Eg: "P90D", "P1Y".
Optional. The time duration before key expiring to rotate or notify. It will be in ISO 8601 duration format. Eg: "P90D", "P1Y".
Optional. The time duration for rotating the key.
Optional. The key rotation policy lifetime actions.
The type for a rotation policy.
Required. Name of the Key Vault. Must be globally unique.
Optional. Location for all resources.
Optional. All access policies to create.
Optional. All secrets to create.
Optional. All keys to create.
Optional. Specifies if the vault is enabled for deployment by script or compute.
Optional. Specifies if the vault is enabled for a template deployment.
Optional. Specifies if the azure platform has access to the vault for enabling disk encryption scenarios.
Optional. Switch to enable/disable Key Vault's soft delete feature.
Optional. softDelete data retention days. It accepts >=7 and <=90.

Optional. Property that controls how data actions are authorized. When true, the key vault will use Role Based Access Control (RBAC) for authorization of data actions, and the access policies specified in vault properties will be ignored. When false, the key vault will use the access policies specified in vault properties, and any policy stored on Azure Resource Manager will be ignored. Note that management actions are always authorized with RBAC.
Optional. The vault's create mode to indicate whether the vault need to be recovered or not.
Optional. Provide 'true' to enable Key Vault's purge protection feature.
Optional. Specifies the SKU for the vault.
Optional. Rules governing the accessibility of the resource from specific network locations.

Optional. Whether or not public network access is allowed for this resource. For security reasons it should be disabled. If not specified, it will be disabled by default if private endpoints are set and networkAcls are not set.
Optional. The lock settings of the service.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create.
Optional. Configuration details for private endpoints. For security reasons, it is recommended to use private endpoints whenever possible.
Optional. Resource tags.
Optional. The diagnostic settings of the service.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.

properties.networkAcls: [if(not(empty(coalesce(parameters('networkAcls'), createObject()))), createObject('bypass', tryGet(parameters('networkAcls'), 'bypass'), 'defaultAction', tryGet(parameters('networkAcls'), 'defaultAction'), 'virtualNetworkRules', coalesce(tryGet(parameters('networkAcls'), 'virtualNetworkRules'), createArray()), 'ipRules', coalesce(tryGet(parameters('networkAcls'), 'ipRules'), createArray())), null())]

properties.notes: [coalesce(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'notes'), if(equals(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'kind'), 'CanNotDelete'), 'Cannot delete resource or child resources.', 'Cannot delete or modify the resource or child resources.'))]

metadata.name: Key Vault Secrets

Required. The principal ID of the principal (user/group/identity) to assign the role to.

parameters.keySize: [if(or(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('keys'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'kty'), 'RSA'), equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('keys'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'kty'), 'RSA-HSM')), createObject('value', coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('keys'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'keySize'), 4096)), createObject('value', null()))]

metadata.name: Private Endpoints
metadata.description: This module deploys a Private Endpoint.
Optional. The name of the Private DNS Zone Group.
Required. The private DNS zone groups to associate the private endpoint. A DNS zone group can support up to 5 DNS zones.
Required. The name of the resource that is unique within a resource group.

Required. The ID of a group obtained from the remote resource that this private endpoint should connect to. If used with private link service connection, this property must be defined as empty string.

Required. The member name of a group obtained from the remote resource that this private endpoint should connect to. If used with private link service connection, this property must be defined as empty string.
Required. A private IP address obtained from the private endpoint's subnet.
Required. Properties of private endpoint IP configurations.
Required. The name of the private link service connection.

Required. The ID of a group obtained from the remote resource that this private endpoint should connect to. If used with private link service connection, this property must be defined as empty string array `[]`.
Required. The resource id of private link service.
Optional. A message passed to the owner of the remote resource with this connection request. Restricted to 140 chars.
Required. Properties of private link service connection.
Optional. FQDN that resolves to private endpoint IP address.
Required. A list of private IP addresses of the private endpoint.
Optional. Specify the name of lock.
Optional. Specify the type of lock.
An AVM-aligned type for a lock.
Optional. The name of the private DNS zone group config.
Required. The resource id of the private DNS zone.
Optional. The name (as GUID) of the role assignment. If not provided, a GUID will be generated.

Required. The role to assign. You can provide either the display name of the role definition, the role definition GUID, or its fully qualified ID in the following format: '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c2f4ef07-c644-48eb-af81-4b1b4947fb11'.
Required. The principal ID of the principal (user/group/identity) to assign the role to.
Optional. The principal type of the assigned principal ID.
Optional. The description of the role assignment.

Optional. The conditions on the role assignment. This limits the resources it can be assigned to. e.g.: @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:ContainerName] StringEqualsIgnoreCase "foo_storage_container".
Optional. Version of the condition.
Optional. The Resource Id of the delegated managed identity resource.
An AVM-aligned type for a role assignment.
Required. Name of the private endpoint resource to create.
Required. Resource ID of the subnet where the endpoint needs to be created.
Optional. Application security groups in which the private endpoint IP configuration is included.
Optional. The custom name of the network interface attached to the private endpoint.
Optional. A list of IP configurations of the private endpoint. This will be used to map to the First Party Service endpoints.
Optional. The private DNS zone group to configure for the private endpoint.
Optional. Location for all Resources.
Optional. The lock settings of the service.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create.
Optional. Tags to be applied on all resources/resource groups in this deployment.
Optional. Custom DNS configurations.

Conditional. A grouping of information about the connection to the remote resource. Used when the network admin does not have access to approve connections to the remote resource. Required if `privateLinkServiceConnections` is empty.
Conditional. A grouping of information about the connection to the remote resource. Required if `manualPrivateLinkServiceConnections` is empty.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.

properties.notes: [if(equals(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'kind'), 'CanNotDelete'), 'Cannot delete resource or child resources.', 'Cannot delete or modify the resource or child resources.')]

metadata.name: Private Endpoint Private DNS Zone Groups
metadata.description: This module deploys a Private Endpoint Private DNS Zone Group.
Optional. The name of the private DNS zone group config.
Required. The resource id of the private DNS zone.
Conditional. The name of the parent private endpoint. Required if the template is used in a standalone deployment.
Required. Array of private DNS zone configurations of the private DNS zone group. A DNS zone group can support up to 5 DNS zones.
Optional. The name of the private DNS zone group.
The name of the private endpoint DNS zone group.
The resource ID of the private endpoint DNS zone group.
The resource group the private endpoint DNS zone group was deployed into.
The resource group the private endpoint was deployed into.
The resource ID of the private endpoint.
The name of the private endpoint.
The location the resource was deployed into.
The custom DNS configurations of the private endpoint.
The resource IDs of the network interfaces associated with the private endpoint.
The group Id for the private endpoint Group.
The resource ID of the key vault.
The name of the resource group the key vault was created in.
The name of the key vault.
The URI of the key vault.
The location the resource was deployed into.
The private endpoints of the key vault.
The properties of the created secrets.
The properties of the created keys.
Azure region of the deployment
The name of the AI Search resource
Name of the storage account
Name of the new Cosmos DB account
Optional. AI Search public network access. Default: disabled.
Optional. AI Search network rules (used when aiSearchPublicNetworkAccess=enabled). Example: { bypass: "None", ipRules: [ { value: "1.2.3.4" } ] }.
Optional. Cosmos DB public network access. Default: Disabled.

Optional. Cosmos DB IP allowlist (used when cosmosDbPublicNetworkAccess=Enabled). Example: ["1.2.3.4","5.6.7.0/24"]. Note: RFC1918 ranges (10/8, 172.16/12, 192.168/16, 100.64/10) are not enforceable by Cosmos IP firewall rules; use Private Endpoints and/or VNet rules instead.
Optional. Storage Account public network access. Default: Disabled.
Optional. Storage Account network ACLs (used when storageAccountPublicNetworkAccess=Enabled). Example: { bypass: "AzureServices", defaultAction: "Deny", ipRules: [ { value: "1.2.3.4" } ] }.
The AI Search Service full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.
The AI Storage Account full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.
The Cosmos DB Account full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.

Map of DNS zone FQDNs to resource group names. If provided, reference existing DNS zones in this resource group instead of creating them.
When false, skip all Private DNS operations (zones, VNet links, and Private DNS Zone Groups). Private Endpoints are still created.
